violations.text: Plastic container was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed item. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, old droppings, and/or other debris: - microwave - cold-hold drawers - popcorn machines (cabinet underneath) - counters under slushy machines Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The floors (service line, food storage, and under Imax seats) and walls (behind soda syrup dispensers) throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2025
Handwashing sink in the bar area was lacking proper signage. PIC created sign. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

Measuring cup was observed in the hand-washing sink in the bar area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine and floor mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took units out of service to be washed/sanitized. PIC disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

The presence of rodents, roaches, and small flies are not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings, live roaches and live small flies. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

Single service items (cups) were observed stored on the floor in the storage area. Items must be stored at least 6 inches from the floor. PIC placed on rack. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025
The following was observed in poor repair: - prep unit (ambient of 70F) - dishwasher (nonfunctional) New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, old droppings, and other debris: - ALL equipment (refrigeration/freezer units, popcorn machines, cooking equipment, scales, etc) - walk-in fan covers - tables (especially shelves and under equipment) - inside cabinets New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the 3 bay sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025
Inspector observed handwashing sink at service area in poor repair (clogged pipe). New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025
The ice machine is lacking an air gap. Inspector observed an air break. PIC fixed pipe on site. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

The following was observed in poor repair. - Ceiling tiles near mop sink and walk-in areas (missing tiles) - Leak in walk-in ceiling near fire suppression system - Walk-in freezer (observed heavy ice accumulation) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2025

The floors, floor drains, and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2025
